auth.accountCreatedSignInFailed: Account created but sign in failed. Please try logging in.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSent: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.redirecting: Your password has been changed. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid reset link. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.passwordRequirements: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

newUser.accountCreated: Your account has been created successfully.

newUser.createDebates: Create your own debates on topics you care about

authError.title: Authentication Error
authError.Configuration: There is a problem with the server configuration.
authError.AccessDenied: You do not have permission to sign in.
authError.Verification: The verification token has expired or has already been used.
authError.OAuthSignin: Error in constructing an authorization URL.
authError.OAuthCallback: Error in handling the response from an OAuth provider.
authError.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create OAuth provider user in the database.
authError.EmailCreateAccount: Could not create email provider user in the database.
authError.Callback: Error in the OAuth callback handler route.
authError.OAuthAccountNotLinked: Email already exists with a different provider.
authError.CredentialsSignin: Sign in failed. Check the details you provided are correct.
authError.SessionRequired: Please sign in to access this page.

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.description: A sign in link has been sent to your email address.
verifyRequest.instructions: Click the link in the email to sign in to your account. The link will expire in 24 hours.

dashboard.protectedPage: This is a protected page. Only authenticated users can see this.
dashboard.authStatusDesc: You are successfully authenticated and have access to this protected dashboard.
dashboard.name: Name:

home.title: Evidence-Based Debates
home.subtitle: Engage in structured, asynchronous debates with mandatory references and clear win conditions. Quality over speed.
home.howItWorksDesc: Four simple steps to engaging, evidence-based debates
home.step1Desc: Browse existing debates or create your own topic. Select a position - For or Against.
home.step2Desc: Make your opening statement with credible evidence. All arguments require verifiable references and sources.
home.step3Desc: Take your time to craft thoughtful rebuttals. Asynchronous format means no rush - quality over speed.
home.step4Desc: The community votes on the strongest arguments. Clear win conditions determine the debate winner.

debates.title: Debates
debates.subtitle: Browse and participate in evidence-based debates
debates.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search query

debateDetail.notFoundDesc: The debate you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

profile.filterDescription: Narrow down debates by status, topic, or search
profile.notParticipatedYet: {{name}} hasn't participated in any debates yet

editProfile.editProfileDesc: Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.

editProfile.imageDescription: Enter a URL to your profile image

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Control how you receive notifications from Debate Platform
settings.inAppDescription: Show notification badges and alerts within the app
settings.emailDescription: Receive email notifications for debate updates and responses
settings.criticalEmailsNote: Critical account-related emails will always be sent regardless of these settings.
settings.updateError: An error occurred while updating preferences

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.yourTurnMessage: The {{side}}s have made their arguments for turn {{turn}}. It's your turn to respond in the debate "{{title}}"
notifications.debateInvitationMessage: {{actor}} has invited you to participate in the debate "{{title}}"
notifications.definitionAcceptedMessage: The definition for "{{term}}" has been accepted
notifications.definitionImprovedMessage: The definition for "{{term}}" has been improved
notifications.forfeitMessage: A {{side}} has forfeited in the debate "{{title}}". The debate continues with remaining participants.

argument.title: Argument
argument.notParticipant: You are not a participant in this debate
argument.notYourTurn: It's not your turn. Current turn: {{side}}
argument.alreadySubmitted: You have already submitted your arguments for this turn
argument.notInProgress: This debate is not currently in progress
argument.noArgsYet: No arguments submitted yet. Be the first to start the debate!
argument.forfeitExplanationDesc: You can provide an optional explanation for forfeiting the debate.
argument.forfeitWarning: You are about to forfeit the debate
argument.forfeitWarningDesc: This means you will concede the entire debate and your opponent will win. This action cannot be undone.
argument.forfeitExplainOptional: You can optionally provide an explanation below.
argument.forfeitPlaceholder: Optional: Explain why you're forfeiting the debate...
argument.forfeitHint: This explanation is optional and will be visible to your opponent.
argument.replyPlaceholder: Write your response to the argument. Address specific points and provide counter-evidence...
argument.argPlaceholder: Present your argument, evidence, and reasoning...
argument.replyHelp: Provide a thoughtful response that addresses the original argument's points
argument.argHelp: Provide a well-reasoned argument with supporting evidence
argument.replyLinkHint: Make sure to address the points in the original argument you're responding to. This argument will be linked to the original in the discussion thread.

argumentList.emptyState: No arguments submitted yet. Be the first to start the debate!

create.title: Create a New Debate
create.description: Define the format, structure arguments, and establish key definitions before publishing.
create.topicHelp: Choose one or more relevant topic categories (max 3 recommended)
create.descPlaceholder: Provide context and background for this debate
create.openingPlaceholder: Present your initial argument, evidence, and reasoning...
create.openingHelp: Provide a well-reasoned opening argument with supporting evidence
create.refUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (include http:// or https://)
create.refUrlHelp: Include http:// or https:// in the URL
create.topicRequired: At least one topic is required
create.argRequired: At least one valid initial argument is required (minimum 10 characters)
create.failedToCreate: Failed to create debate. Please try again.

info.creator: Creator
info.noParticipants: No participants yet. Invite users to join the debate.
info.participantsDesc: Manage invitations and join requests for this debate
info.maxReached: This debate has reached the maximum number of participants ({{count}})
info.signInToJoin: Please sign in to join this debate or manage invitations
info.typeToSearch: Start typing to search for users

status.draftDesc: This debate is still being set up
status.unknownDesc: This debate has an unknown status
status.yourTimeExpired: Your time has expired! You may forfeit this turn soon.
status.opponentTimeExpired: Opponent's time has expired! They may forfeit this turn soon.
status.hurryRespond: Hurry! You have only {{time}} left to respond or you may forfeit this turn.
status.hurryLessThan: Hurry! You have less than {{time}} to respond or you may forfeit this turn.
status.criticalTime: Critical! You have only {{time}} left! Submit your argument immediately or you may forfeit this turn.

definition.title: Key Definitions
definition.description: Define important terms and concepts for this debate
definition.submissionNotAvailable: Definition submission is not available at this time
definition.noDefinitionsDesc: Defining key terms helps ensure all participants share a common understanding of important concepts in the debate.
definition.noDefinitionsList: Participants haven't defined any key terms for this debate yet. Definitions help establish shared understanding of important concepts.
definition.improveDescription: Modify and improve this definition to better clarify the term and address any concerns.
definition.proposeDescription: Define key terms and concepts for turn {{turn}} of the debate.
definition.termPlaceholder: e.g., Universal Basic Income, Sustainability, Democracy
definition.termHelp: The specific term or concept you're defining
definition.defPlaceholder: Provide a clear, precise definition of the term
definition.defHelp: Be as clear and specific as possible
definition.superseded: This definition has been superseded by a newer version.
definition.improved: This definition has been contested and improved upon by other participants.
definition.atLeastOneRequired: At least one definition is required

reference.description: Add supporting references for your argument
reference.title: Title
reference.urlHelp: Provide a link to the source (optional but recommended)
reference.noReferencesDesc: Add supporting references to strengthen your argument

voting.supportDefAria: Support this definition. Currently has {{count}} supports
voting.opposeDefAria: Oppose this definition. Currently has {{count}} opposes

submission.openingArgsDesc: Present your initial arguments with supporting evidence
submission.defineTermsDesc: Define important terms to establish a common understanding
